revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Merge [[Category:日本の教育 (世紀別)]] into [[Category:Education in Japan by Century]] via bot
Merge [[Category:戦後日本の教育]] into [[Category:Postwar Education in Japan]] via bot
Immanuelle moved page [[Category:21世紀日本の教育]] to [[Category:21st Century Education in Japan]]: Merge [[Category:21世紀日本の教育]] into [[Category:21st Century Education in Japan]] via bot
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{各世紀日本の教育}} 21世紀日本の[[教育]]に関するカテゴリ。
{{デフォルトソート:21 にほん きよういく}} [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]

Bot: tag with [[Category:Categories missing Wikidata with Japanese interwikis]] (has ja: interwiki, no Wikidata)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{各世紀日本の教育}} {{デフォルトソート:21 にほん きよういく}} {{citation needed|21 にほん きよういく}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:21世紀日本の教育}} {{translated page|ja|Category:21世紀日本の教育|comment=category history here}} {{translated page|ja|Category:21世紀日本の教育|version=102679619}} <!--interwikis--> [[ja:Category:21世紀日本の教育]] <!--categories--> [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:日本の教育機関_(21世紀設立)]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:21st century in education]] [[Category:21st century in Japan]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Education in Japan by Century]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Postwar Education in Japan]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[Category:Categories missing Wikidata with Japanese interwikis]]
